{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142931F0395AAFB7A78CC07671"}"},"total":3279},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579189045008696089","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的太棒了！内容好看又丰富，仅仅一个觉醒仪式就写了11章，生动体现了主角的天赋是多么的牛逼！
男主的系统更是锦上添花，为主角提供了强大的战力支持，开局就解锁阿修罗模板20%的进度！七八章十几章的战斗下来更是足足提升了0.2%的进度！找这个进度下去，仅仅需要不到百年就能解锁全部的阿修罗能力了！未来可期！（ps人类世界还有不到10年的时间）
配角的描写也很好看，男主自带一个没血缘关系的姐姐，虽然周围人调侃，俩人对视就脸红，气氛暧昧但是无女主文哦！虽然有个青梅竹马，周围更是美女无数，但男主眼瞎心更瞎哦","text_exts":[{"e":231,"s":227,"text":"青梅竹马","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742473718CC07671%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227579189045008696089%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227073799002818350110%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764669680,"group_id":"7073799002818350110","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxeaCSSYjE8kHLnKipYCP+KS0P0z0xAVjkhkKPZ701FP","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bcc888f98043411aba8b7835e9aca8d3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789954&x-signature=CpULTglj8YaDtWWz%2FR31iVeiJvA%3D","user_id":"4451301157775837","user_name":"天晚清风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4451301157775837","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7073799002818350110","book_info":{"abstract":"苏夜穿越到了邪崇横行的超凡世界，人类为对抗邪崇需在十八岁时觉醒异能！
因天生眼盲而被义姐养育了十八年的苏夜，本以为自己一生将与觉醒者无缘之时，模板系统激活了，能解锁前世一些耳闻能详的强悍人物模板为己用！
“叮！恭喜宿主获得阿拉德大陆四大鬼剑士之一，阿修罗解锁模板！”
开局一手无双剑术，一手波动之力，SSS级异能震撼全场！
随着解锁进度达到50%，领悟心眼，暗天波动起，黑夜彻底笼罩了世界！
75%，掌控雷神之息，本该走向黑暗的双眸竟绽放出俯瞰人间的耀世雷芒！
95%，睁开的慧眼，波动流动之处，力量将无所不及，这是属于波动者的无上权能！
而这，才仅仅只是开始。
当帝血弑天模板、五条悟模板，还有后续那动漫、影视、小说之中一位位傲世巅的无敌模板解锁之时。
“我苏夜，既是这诸天寰宇唯一的神！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/566c2993dd983bfae53e1ca99df680db","author":"红烧雪碧","author_id":"","book_id":"7073799002818350110","book_name":"全属性异能，从执掌万物波动开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182858","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7073800735917343270","read_count":"11384","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1306665"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"536","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,诸天万界,开局,打脸,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ff571b29166997a9676d67baf0b5414~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431371&x-signature=55TC00P5sLjdw%2BBPKOpcG8EelL4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"boo
